title: Regina Blackshear
compiled_truth: Regina Blackshear is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-07 to 2001-11-14), Regina Blackshear sent 8 and received 196 emails, totalling 204 interactions. Top correspondents: [Judy Hernandez](people/judy-hernandez) (8), [Amber Ebow](people/amber-ebow) (7), [Angela Barnett](people/angela-barnett) (7), [Eve Puckett](people/eve-puckett) (7), [Tharsilla Broussard](people/tharsilla-broussard) (7).
